Updates.Message: Initial upload

- 3 new secrets, totaling up to 5
- Fixed around a bajllion issues (ferryman clips, secrets actually work properly now)
- Fixed some abhorrent geometry
- Chair props have been readded
- Glass hitscan beam issue fixed
- Added OOB (Out of bounds) messages
- Going OOB now fails challenge
- Fixed timer by just not bothering with it (timer starts as soon as level is loaded so have fun)

- Replace some old assets with new skilltest 2 ones
- Timer stop chicanery is gone; timer just runs like in any other level now
- Stairs have been textured
- Timer no longer starts in firstroom
- Waves with fake statue cerberi no longer end prematurely
- Added edgeloops to final arena to prevent flickering
- Geometry in some arenas redone
- Challenge is less strict to compensate with timer changes
- Some missing sounds readded
- <color=red>Leaderboards wiped</color> to prevent past records being unobtainable
Initial upload
Initial upload
- Fixed enemies clipping trough walls in the small room

- Minor Tweaks so the levels don't break with layer 7 update and bug fixes
- Sorry no G-2 yet ;)

- Fixed a bug that made the level imposible to complete
- Sorry no G-2 yet ;)

- Ported for violence update
- Green door now has green pilars
- Tweaked idol and skulls capsules
- Height of the ceiling on the last room aumented to avoid Hideous Mass' attacks from crashing
- Secret exit on G-1 optimized for faster speedruns
- G-1 and uG-1 are now possible NoMo% in normal exit
- Moved the terminal at the end of G-1
- Power up in uG-1 now resets with checkpoints
- If you get softlocked on ANY level talk to me on discord (I always have DMs open!): gggamesxdlol
- Sorry no G-2 yet ;)

- Complete overhaul of the Pixel Boards:
    * Now capable of creating practically any color via RGB sliders
    * Recent Colors system
    * Brighter colors (big thanks to Crash for making this all possible!)
- Added more Pixel Boards (6x6-32x32)
- Added a custom track "Painting Quarters" by oklahomatíc
- Added a Music Changer
- Overhauled Theme Changer and new themes (Evening, Burning, Forest)
- Added a playable Jenga!
- Added Featured Art from other people to get your inspiration!
- Improved lighting and a lot of Quality Of Life changes
Initial upload
- Fixed a bug allowing the player to clip trough the ground at the end
Initial upload

- Finally removes navmesh encroaching on posts & railings
- Fixes '10 second speedrun' clip
- New scrollable credits
- New painting courtesy of Illuminion

- Fixes credits not properly muting music
- Fixes final arena speedrun clip

- Ported to Violence
- MAJOR balancing changes
- Final arena cutscene now skips upon checkpointing
- Book added to final secret

Initial upload

- New music
- Secrets
- Drainable water
- First room overhaul
- Lava room tweaks
- Water room tweaks
- Level challenge

Initial upload
Initial upload
Initial upload
Initial upload

- Fixed a softlock when you die on the secret encounter
- Fixed a few lights not working properly
- Fixed an exploit which allowed players to break protected idols earlier than intended
- Fixed miscellanous/decoration-related issues (z-fighting, noticeable vertex lighting mistakes, etc.)
- Fixed a rare occurrence where the Insurrectionist would sometimes jump out of bounds and get stuck on ceilings

- Small geometry tweaks that should hopefully improve performance
- Added a "potato graphics" option at the beginning of the level for low-end computers, in case lag persists
- Fixed an oversight of the previous update that made the level inaccessible/unplayable
- Added a failsafe that destroys idols incase their targets die prematurely

- Improved some lighting/added new lights to better guide the player where to go
- Replaced the 3 blue skulls system with a blue and red one, allowing for more a casual-friendly experience as only one path is now needed to complete the level (Both parts still need to be cleared to obtain a P Rank)
- Nerfed the style requirement down to 48k and added 5 more seconds to the time
- Added an additional visual for crowds to help them stand out better in dark areas
- Added an (invisible) checkpoint in the middle of the double swordsmachines sequence to make the arena less frustrating
- Changed the beginning ambient noise

<color=cyan>Additions</color>:
- Added 3-1!
- Added terminal entries for custom enemies
- Added the new custom enemy to 5-1

<color=cyan>Fixes/Misc.</color>:
- 5-1 is now Clash Mode-compatible
- 5-1 is now nomo/nomow-compatible (the disabled enemies cheat, not the gamemode)
- Fixed a softlock where Swordmachines could get stuck on platforms after jumping onto them
- Added a hint for where to go when both red and blue skulls are collected
- Patched up some areas which had missing geometry
- Slightly changed some enemies' placement to prevent them from spawning in the player's face

- Fixed a bug where the introductory knight fight would sometimes not spawn at all after completing the first deal (3-1)
- Fixed a small glitch where text from Statues would sometimes appear really small (3-1)
- Added missing collision to some geometry, which in some cases could softlock players going into unintended parts of the map (3-1, 5-1)
- Added discord gaming status images for both levels respectively
- Fixed a bug where some waves of enemies wouldn't spawn, making P ranks impossible

- Made time requirements for A, B and C ranks less strict
- Fixed a glitch where knights' AI would sometimes break and stop doing anything
- Added some lights to better indicate where some doors are

- Now Violence-compatible
- Added additional lights to see some doors better (3-1)
- Changed some enemy placements ever-so-slightly (5-1)
- Sprinkled in some Violence enemies (3-1, 5-1)
- Fixed an oversight of the previous update that could result in getting softlocked in 3-1

- Fixed missing sounds and magenta textures in certain spots
- Fixed one of the deal messages displaying incorrectly in 3-1
- Fixed Faustian Brokers not enraging properly

- Fixed a few missing environment sounds in 3-1
- Fixed a softlock in 3-1's final arena caused by doors not unlocking upon checkpoint restart
Initial upload
